chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-173 of 2008 C.P No. D-2399 of 2008 C.P No. D-3228 of 2010 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 06.02.2026. Mr. Imtiaz Solangi, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, Advocate for Respondent (C.P No. d-2399/2008) Mr. Aftab Ali, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, A.A.G. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The Petitions stand dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
